snippet.title: NEW UPDATE ‚ú® MAGIC ITEMS ‚ú® Coming soon... (Clash Royale TV Royale)
snippet.description:
MAGIC ITEMS ARE COMING TO CLASH ROYALE! Our new update is coming very soon making it easier than ever to upgrade your cards and build your perfect deck! Also included in this update are balance changes, bug fixes, updated UI, Clan Wars 2 changes, performance improvements & more!

00:00‚Äã NEW UPDATE
00:30‚Äã MAGIC ITEMS
00:42‚Äã WILD CARDS
01:12‚Äã BOOK OF CARDS
01:25‚Äã BOOK OF BOOKS
01:37‚Äã CHEST KEY
01:50‚Äã MAGIC COIN
02:04‚Äã WHERE TO GET MAGIC ITEMS
02:24‚Äã PASS ROYALE IMPROVEMENTS
02:52‚Äã OTHER CHANGES
03:01‚Äã CLAN WARS 2 IMPROVEMENTS
03:21‚Äã BALANCE CHANGES
03:43‚Äã NEW SEASON

Information in this video is subject to change. All gameplay is taken from a work in progress developer build version, not the live game. Magic Items are only available for players King Level 4+.

Subscribe for more! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
‚Ä¢ Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
‚Ä¢ Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
‚Ä¢ Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
‚Ä¢ Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
‚Ä¢ Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
‚Ä¢ Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
‚Ä¢ Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
‚Ä¢ Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
‚Ä¢ Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
‚Ä¢ Play new events every week
‚Ä¢ Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

#ClashRoyale #Update #MagicItems

snippet.title: Clash Royale Update: MAGIC ITEMS ARE COMING! (New Animation)
snippet.description:
**NEW UPDATE COMING SOON**
Get Ready to Upgrade Your Cards Faster with Magic Items!
Watch the Magic Items TV Royale: https://youtu.be/7rQvfqoLnmw

Subscribe for more! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
‚Ä¢ Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
‚Ä¢ Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
‚Ä¢ Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
‚Ä¢ Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
‚Ä¢ Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
‚Ä¢ Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
‚Ä¢ Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
‚Ä¢ Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
‚Ä¢ Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
‚Ä¢ Play new events every week
‚Ä¢ Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: Gojira - Amazonia [OFFICIAL VIDEO]
snippet.description:
New album 'Fortitude' available April 30.
Pre-order: http://gojira.lnk.to/fortitude

Proceeds from this song will benefit The Articulation of Indigenous Peoples of Brazil (APIB) who advocate for environmental and cultural rights of indigenous tribes in the Amazon who have suffered immensely - victims of deforestation, land loss, forced labor, violence, and harassment.

Directed and edited by Charles De Meyer
Cinematography by Maximiliaan Dierickx and Vincent Moon
Produced by Jo√£o Vinhas, Benjamin Honor√©, Charles De Meyer, Chris Brown

First Assistant Camera: Daniel Foeldes
Steadycam Operator: Sven Joukes

Monitoring Engineer: S√©bastien Roblin
Key Grip: Unai Duhalde
Grip: Aitz Amilibia
Gaffer: Fax

Catering: Mirelen & Aize Duhalde

On-Set Photography: Anne Degu√©h√©gny & Gabrielle Duplantier

Colorist: Xavier Dockx

Amazon Partnership Liaison/Producer: Analuisa Anjos
Assistant Producer Amazon Connection: Ivan Sawyer

Contains Images Taken From The Project 
‚ÄòH√≠bridos, The Spirits Of Brazil‚Äô by Priscilla Telmon & Vincent Moon
http://www.hibridos.cc

Additional Footage From Midia Ninja, Kumiko Hayashi & Hauxplay

Gojira and the film crew would like to thank
Adriana Varela, Emilie Barrucand (Wayanga NGO), Jaqueline Kaiow√°, Fabiana Fernandres, S√¥nia Guajajara and APIB, The Tribes Of The Amazon, The Fulni‚Äô√¥, Krah√¥, Mehinako, Xavante, Yawanaw√° and Yawalapiti People, Fran√ßois Maton, Sabri Bouchfar and everyone at Atabal, Kristen Mulderig, Ted Jensen, Andy Wallace, Johann Meyer, Jamie Uertz, Taylor Bingley, Vincent Moon, Fernanda Abreu, Duncan Russell and Patricia Motte-Lorente

Lyrics:
Incite a riot, put yourself in a trance
You rotate the frame in a world you rely on
A scar, a line has been drawn in the sand
Behold the life, the boundaries fools will crush
 
The greatest miracle
Is burning to the ground
 
Onto the next stage of the plan
Mourn the witness of the wind
A hand full of thunder
Will rise one last time
 
There‚Äôs fire in the sky
You‚Äôre in the Amazon
The greatest miracle
Is burning to the ground
 
Godly Amazonia
Bloody Amazonia
Mighty Amazonia
Killing Amazonia
 
Burn the land
Learn the end
 
Burn
Another Gold mine is unveiled
The source of our sorrow
Learn
Embedded in these walls of green
Is the curse that we follow
There‚Äôs fire in the sky
You‚Äôre in the Amazon
The greatest miracle
Is burning to the ground
 
Mighty Amazonia
Killing Amazonia
Godly Amazonia
Bloody Amazonia

snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for ‚ÄúYou All Over Me‚Äù (Feat. Maren Morris) (Taylor‚Äôs Version) [From The Vault] ‚Äì off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor‚Äôs Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
‚ñ∫Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

‚ñ∫Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
‚ñ∫Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
‚ñ∫Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ‚Äòem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ‚Äòdon't you wish you had me‚Äô grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: Visite du VAN 4x4 dans lequel nous vivons depuis 2 ans (Astuces 100% DIY et PAS CHER) / VANTOUR
snippet.description:
Depuis plus de 2 ans, nous vivons √Ý temps plein dans ce L300 4x4 Mitsubishi de 1991.  
Il nous a permis de traverser 21 pays africains, des d√©serts, des rivi√®res et des for√™ts tropicales pour des aventures extr√™mes. 

On vous pr√©sente enfin notre petite maison sur roue, dans ses moindres recoins en passant par le prix d'achat, la tente de toit (pr√©sentation et retour d'exp√©rience), la cuisine et son r√©chaud √Ý essence, la douche √Ý pression, le coffre-fort, la table qui se transforme en lit...

Des conseils et astuces pour un am√©nagement fait main et vraiment pas cher üí∞

‚û° Formation Sketchup 3D :  http://bit.ly/Amenager-son-van-en-3D
CODE PROMO - 20‚Ç¨ : LEON2021 valable jusqu'au 7 avril

‚û° Vid√©os plus d√©taill√©es de nos √©quipements :
- Tuto douche solaire : https://youtu.be/9Lran0bNW7I
- Nos 14 indispensables : https://youtu.be/Lvq05fX8lao
- Am√©nagement de notre van : https://youtu.be/xNvmjnWH7gA
- Tuto douche pompe immerg√©e : https://youtu.be/w3uBrLMAa24
- Cr√©er des rangements : https://youtu.be/8xnV0FyAX6M
- Conseils pour am√©nager son van en 3D : https://youtu.be/UcDJzvTowms
- Avis et entretien r√©chaud √Ý essence : https://youtu.be/vWBBQyQOsEI

‚û° Notre Instagram : https://instagram.com/lesmariolestrotters

#VANTOUR #L300 #4x4
*****
üíñ FAIRE 1 DON 
5‚Ç¨ un restau ; 15‚Ç¨ une semaine d'internet ; 50‚Ç¨ un plein pour L√©on et une carte postale pour toi
https://bit.ly/LesMarioles-PayPal

üí∞ Comment avons-nous √©conomis√© assez pour vivre 2 ans sans travailler ? üí∞
Notre formation regroupant toutes nos astuces : http://bit.ly/2uMfBMF
-10‚Ç¨ avec le code promo MARIOLES10

üìß Collaborations : lesmariolestrotters@gmail.com

üôã‚Äç‚ôÄüôã‚Äç‚ôÇ Qui sommes-nous ?
Nous traversons l'Afrique depuis plus de 2 ans avec L√©on, notre van 4x4 (L300, Mitsubishi de 1991) que nous avons r√©nov√© pendant le covid-19 au Mozambique.
Nous avons tout quitt√© pour vivre notre r√™ve, tester un mode de vie minimaliste et te montrer que c'est accessible √Ý tous !!
‚û° Notre parcours, de nos CDI √Ý Paris √Ý nos 1 an Afrique, est r√©sum√©e dans cette vid√©o de 8 min : https://youtu.be/ADb9S5mrRhw

üå± Pourquoi nos vid√©os ne sont pas en 4K ?
Nous faisons le choix de les publier en 1080 p pour r√©duire notre impact environnemental (4x moins √©nergivore que la 4K).
Nous t'invitons √©galement √Ý r√©duire la r√©solution des vid√©os que tu regardes sur Youtube (360 p par exemple)

On se retrouve sur INSTAGRAM entre deux vid√©os : @lesmariolestrotters 
MARIon et anatOLE (Les Marioles)

en.title: VAN TOUR after 2 years living in this 4x4 CAMPER VAN (LOW TECH and DIY Tips and tricks)
en.description:
For over 2 years we have been living full time in this 1991 Mitsubishi L300 4x4.
It allowed us to cross 21 African countries, deserts, rivers and rainforests for extreme adventures.

Finally, we are presenting to you our little house on wheels, in every nook and cranny, including the purchase price, the roof tent (presentation and feedback), the kitchen and its petrol stove, the solar shower, the table that turns into a bed ...

Instagram : https://instagram.com/lesmariolestrotters

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Wednesday, March 24 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 4:28 a.m. EDT, or 8:28 UTC, and a backup opportunity is available on Thursday, March 25 at 4:06 a.m. EDT, or 8:06 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously supported launch of the GPS-III Space Vehicle 03 and Turksat 5A missions in addition to three Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚Äù droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9‚Äôs fairing supported the Sentinel-6A mission and the other supported a previous Starlink mission.
